description_long: This is a narrow suspension footbridge with a gently curved wooden plank deck, supported by two parallel steel cables running along the sides. The bridge features a mesh wire railing for safety, attached to vertical posts spaced evenly along the length. Four lantern-style lighting fixtures hang at the entrance and exit points, adding a rustic and functional touch. The wooden planks are weathered, suggesting outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on practicality and minimal ornamentation. The bridge is suitable for pedestrian use in parks, urban greenways, or as a crossing over small water features.
description: A narrow suspension footbridge with a curved wooden plank deck, mesh wire railings, and lantern-style lights at each end. The design is rustic and utilitarian, ideal for pedestrian crossings in urban parks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden deck, mesh wire railings, and lanterns at both ends.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the narrow width, wooden planks, and the entrance with two lanterns flanking the walkway.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the curved deck, mesh railings, and lanterns.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite entrance, showing the straight approach and lanterns at the entry.
attribute_railing_design: metal mesh wire panels with vertical posts and steel cable top rails
attribute_lighting_fixtures: lantern-style hanging lights at each end
